declarations.description:
A glassmorphic button with spectral gradient interactions.

- **primary**: Spectral gradient background with hover glow.
- **secondary**: Glass surface with spectral border on hover.
- **ghost**: Minimal, text appears on hover.
declarations.name: SgButton

members.description: When true, the button fills the full width of its container.

declarations.description:
A glassmorphic card component with spectral gradient interactions.

- **Focus-visible**: A 2px spectral gradient ring appears on keyboard focus.
- **Hover**: The elevated variant gains a subtle spectral glow.
- **Selected/accent**: A gradient border overlay decorates the card.
declarations.name: SgCard

members.name: variant
members.description:
Card visual variant.
- `elevated`: glass surface with shadow + spectral hover glow (default)
- `outlined`: transparent with visible border + subtle glow on hover
- `ghost`: minimal, no border or bg until hover

members.name: padding
members.description:
Inner padding size.
- `sm`: 12px
- `md`: 20px (default)
- `lg`: 28px

members.name: accent
members.description: When true, renders a 1px spectral gradient border overlay.

members.name: selected
members.description:
When true, renders a thicker spectral gradient border
to indicate the selected/active state.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
Card visual variant.
- `elevated`: glass surface with shadow + spectral hover glow (default)
- `outlined`: transparent with visible border + subtle glow on hover
- `ghost`: minimal, no border or bg until hover

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description:
Inner padding size.
- `sm`: 12px
- `md`: 20px (default)
- `lg`: 28px

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: When true, renders a 1px spectral gradient border overlay.

When true, renders a thicker spectral gradient border
to indicate the selected/active state.

A glassmorphic modal dialog rendered in a portal (`document.body`)
so it always overflows any container.
declarations.name: SgDialog

members.name: _portalCSS
members.default: ` .backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); z-index: 1000; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity var(--sg-transition-base, 250ms ease); } .backdrop--open { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; } .dialog { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: var(--sg-dialog-max-width, 480px); max-height: 85vh; margin: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: var(--sg-dialog-radius, var(--sg-radius-lg, 20px)); padding: var(--sg-dialog-padding, 24px); color: var(--sg-text-primary, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)); background: var(--sg-glass-bg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)); backdrop-filter: var(--sg-glass-blur, blur(20px)); -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--sg-glass-blur, blur(20px)); border: 1px solid var(--sg-glass-border, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12)); box-shadow: var(--sg-glass-shadow-lg, 0 8px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18)); overflow-y: auto; transform: scale(0.95) translateY(8px); transition: transform var(--sg-transition-base, 250ms ease), opacity var(--sg-transition-base, 250ms ease); } .backdrop--open .dialog { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); } .dialog--accent::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; padding: 1px; background: var(--sg-dialog-accent, var(--sg-gradient-spectral, linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(212, 134, 159, 0.5), rgba(196, 160, 80, 0.5), rgba(127, 168, 141, 0.5), rgba(122, 128, 192, 0.5)) )); -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0); -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0); mask-composite: exclude; pointer-events: none; } .header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-glass-border, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12)); } .header__title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; } .header__close { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border: none; background: transparent; color: var(--sg-text-secondary, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)); cursor: pointer; border-radius: var(--sg-radius-sm, 8px); font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1; transition: background var(--sg-transition-fast, 150ms ease); } .header__close:hover { background: var(--sg-glass-bg-hover, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14)); color: var(--sg-text-primary, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)); } .body { flex: 1; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--sg-text-secondary, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)); } .footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--sg-glass-border, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12)); } `

declarations.description:
A simple SVG icon wrapper. Use `name` for built-in icons (30+ Feather-style
icons), or slot a custom SVG for ad‑hoc icons.

Built‑in icons: menu, close, chevron-down, chevron-up, chevron-left,
chevron-right, check, external-link, search, arrow-left, arrow-right,
arrow-up, arrow-down, plus, minus, info, alert-circle, user, settings,
mail, home, edit, trash-2, eye, eye-off, download, upload, copy,
alert-triangle, x-circle, check-circle, sun, moon, bell, clock,
maximize-2, minimize-2.
declarations.name: SgIcon

cssProperties.description: Icon colour (inherits text colour by default).
cssProperties.name: --sg-icon-color

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-select label=${args.label || ''} placeholder=${args.placeholder || 'Select an option'} .value=${args.value || ''} error=${args.error || ''} .options=${[...(args.options ?? [])]} ?disabled=${args.disabled} ?multiple=${args.multiple} ?clearable=${args.clearable} ?accent=${args.accent} ></sg-select> `, args: { label: '', placeholder: 'Select an option', value: '', error: '', disabled: false, multiple: false, clearable: false, accent: false, options: [...SHARED_OPTIONS], }, }

declarations.name: WithLabel
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-select label=${args.label || 'Favorite fruit'} placeholder=${args.placeholder || 'Choose a fruit'} .value=${args.value || ''} .options=${[...(args.options ?? [...SHARED_OPTIONS])]} ?disabled=${args.disabled} ?multiple=${args.multiple} ?clearable=${args.clearable} ?accent=${args.accent} ></sg-select> `, args: { label: 'Favorite fruit', placeholder: 'Choose a fruit', value: '', disabled: false, multiple: false, clearable: false, accent: false, options: [...SHARED_OPTIONS], }, }

[...SHARED_OPTIONS])]} ?disabled=${args.disabled} ?accent=${args.accent} ></sg-select> `, args: { label: 'Favorite fruit', placeholder: 'Choose a fruit', value: 'banana', disabled: false, accent: false, options: [...SHARED_OPTIONS], }, }

declarations.name: Error
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-select label=${args.label || 'Country'} placeholder=${args.placeholder || 'Select a country'} .value=${args.value || ''} error=${args.error || 'Please select a country'} .options=${[...(args.options ?? [ { value: 'us', label: 'United States' }, { value: 'ca', label: 'Canada' }, { value: 'uk', label: 'United Kingdom' }, ])]} ?disabled=${args.disabled} ?accent=${args.accent} ></sg-select> `, args: { label: 'Country', placeholder: 'Select a country', value: '', error: 'Please select a country', disabled: false, accent: false, options: [ { value: 'us', label: 'United States' }, { value: 'ca', label: 'Canada' }, { value: 'uk', label: 'United Kingdom' }, ], }, }

declarations.description:
A glass-styled dropdown select with spectral gradient accents.

Uses a custom dropdown UI (not native `<select>`) for full styling control.
declarations.name: SgSelect

members.name: accent
members.description: When true, renders a spectral gradient border overlay on the trigger.

members.name: _instances
members.description: All sg-select instances alive in the DOM — used to close others on open.

members.name: _portalEl
members.description: Portal element (child of document.body) that hosts the dropdown list.

members.name: #ensurePortal
members.description: Create or reuse the portal element at document.body.

members.name: #repositionPortal
members.description: Position the portal to appear just below the trigger, matching its width.

members.name: #renderPortal
members.description: Render the options list into the portal and show it.

members.name: #portalTemplate
members.description: Template for the portal-hosted dropdown.

members.name: #destroyPortal
members.description: Destroy the portal element.

members.name: #updatePortalContent
members.description: Re-render the portal's options list (called after highlight/value changes).

members.name: #scrollPortalToIndex
members.description: Scroll the portal's list so the highlighted option is visible.

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: When true, renders a spectral gradient border overlay on the trigger.

The `spectral` variant uses a conic-gradient ring that sweeps the spectral palette as it spins.', }, }, }, }

declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-spinner size=${args.size || 'md'} variant=${args.variant || 'spectral'}></sg-spinner> `, args: { size: 'md', variant: 'spectral' }, }

declarations.default: { title: 'Components/SgTabs', component: 'sg-tabs', argTypes: { tabs: { control: 'object' }, activeTab: { control: 'text' }, variant: { control: 'select', options: ['underline', 'pills', 'glass'] }, }, parameters: { docs: { description: { component: 'A tabbed container with glassmorphism styling.', }, }, }, }

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default:
{ render: (args) => html`
Welcome to the dashboard. Here you'll find an overview of your recent activity and quick actions.
Your profile settings including preferences, notifications, and account details.
Security settings to manage your password, two-factor authentication, and session history.
 `, args: { tabs: [ { id: 'tab1', label: 'Overview' }, { id: 'tab2', label: 'Settings' }, { id: 'tab3', label: 'Security' }, ], variant: 'glass', }, }

declarations.name: Underline
declarations.default:
{ render: (args) => html`
Underline style — simple and clean.
An underline indicator shows the active tab.
No glass background on the active tab.
 `, args: { tabs: [ { id: 'tab1', label: 'Design' }, { id: 'tab2', label: 'Code' }, { id: 'tab3', label: 'Deploy' }, ], variant: 'underline', }, }

declarations.name: Pills
declarations.default:
{ render: (args) => html`
Pills variant with rounded active indicator.
Active tab has a solid background fill.
Great for filter-style navigation.
 `, args: { tabs: [ { id: 'tab1', label: 'All' }, { id: 'tab2', label: 'Active' }, { id: 'tab3', label: 'Archived' }, ], variant: 'pills', }, }

declarations.name: Preselected
declarations.default:
{ render: (args) => html`
General settings panel.
Advanced configuration options for power users.
Admin-only controls and system preferences.
 `, args: { tabs: [ { id: 'general', label: 'General' }, { id: 'advanced', label: 'Advanced' }, { id: 'admin', label: 'Admin' }, ], activeTab: 'advanced', variant: 'glass', }, }

declarations.name: WithDisabled
declarations.default:
{ render: (args) => html`
Public profile visible to everyone.
Private information — requires authentication.
Hidden content only accessible via direct link.
 `, args: { tabs: [ { id: 'public', label: 'Public' }, { id: 'private', label: 'Private', disabled: true }, { id: 'hidden', label: 'Hidden' }, ], variant: 'glass', }, }

declarations.description: A tabbed container with glassmorphism styling.
declarations.name: SgTabs

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when the active tab changes. `event.detail` contains `{ tabId }`.

declarations.name: Default
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-textarea variant=${args.variant || 'outlined'} placeholder=${args.placeholder || 'Write something…'} .value=${args.value || ''} label=${args.label || ''} error=${args.error || ''} rows=${args.rows ?? 3} maxlength=${args.maxlength ?? 0} resize=${args.resize || 'vertical'} ?disabled=${args.disabled} ?readonly=${args.readonly} ?clearable=${args.clearable} ></sg-textarea> `, args: { variant: 'outlined', placeholder: 'Write something…', label: '', value: '', error: '', rows: 3, maxlength: 0, resize: 'vertical', disabled: false, readonly: false, clearable: false, }, }

declarations.name: WithLabel
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <sg-textarea label="Description" placeholder="Enter a detailed description…" ></sg-textarea> `, }

declarations.name: Ghost
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <sg-textarea label="Notes" placeholder="Ghost variant notes…" variant="ghost" ></sg-textarea> `, }

declarations.name: WithError
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <sg-textarea label="Message" placeholder="Type your message" value="This is too short" error="Message must be at least 20 characters" ></sg-textarea> `, }

declarations.name: Disabled
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <sg-textarea label="Disabled" placeholder="Cannot edit" value="This textarea is disabled" disabled ></sg-textarea> `, }

declarations.name: Clearable
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <sg-textarea label="Tags" placeholder="Add tags…" value="design, ui, components" clearable ></sg-textarea> `, }

members.name: accent
members.description: When true, renders a spectral gradient border overlay.

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: When true, renders a spectral gradient border overlay.

declarations.description:
A container that stacks sg-toast notifications in a fixed viewport corner.

Toasts are rendered into a portal at `document.body` so they always float
above all content, regardless of where this container is placed in the DOM.
declarations.name: SgToastContainer

members.name: _portalEl
members.description: Portal element at document.body.

members.name: _syncing
members.description: True while syncing to prevent slotchange re-entry loops.

members.name: #ensurePortal
members.description: Ensure the portal div exists at document.body.

members.name: #applyPortalPosition
members.description: Position the portal at the chosen viewport corner and align toasts naturally.

members.name: #syncPortal
members.description: Move slotted sg-toast elements into the portal.

members.name: #destroyPortal
members.description: Remove the portal from the DOM.

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: 'Components/SgToast', component: 'sg-toast', argTypes: { variant: { control: 'select', options: ['info', 'success', 'warning', 'error'] }, open: { control: 'boolean' }, dismissible: { control: 'boolean' }, }, parameters: { docs: { description: { component: 'A glassmorphic toast notification with variant icons and optional dismiss.', }, }, }, }

declarations.name: Info
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-toast variant=${args.variant || 'info'} ?open=${args.open} ?dismissible=${args.dismissible} duration="0" > Your changes have been saved successfully. </sg-toast> `, args: { variant: 'info', open: true, dismissible: true }, }

declarations.name: Success
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-toast variant=${args.variant || 'success'} ?open=${args.open} ?dismissible=${args.dismissible} duration="0" > Operation completed successfully. </sg-toast> `, args: { variant: 'success', open: true, dismissible: true }, }

declarations.name: Warning
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-toast variant=${args.variant || 'warning'} ?open=${args.open} ?dismissible=${args.dismissible} duration="0" > Your session is about to expire. </sg-toast> `, args: { variant: 'warning', open: true, dismissible: true }, }

declarations.name: Error
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-toast variant=${args.variant || 'error'} ?open=${args.open} ?dismissible=${args.dismissible} duration="0" > Something went wrong. Please try again. </sg-toast> `, args: { variant: 'error', open: true, dismissible: true }, }

declarations.name: AllVariants
declarations.default: { render: () => html` <sg-toast-container position="top-right" style="position:relative;min-height:260px;"> <sg-toast variant="info" open duration="0"> Your changes have been saved successfully. </sg-toast> <sg-toast variant="success" open duration="0"> Operation completed successfully. </sg-toast> <sg-toast variant="warning" open duration="0"> Your session is about to expire. </sg-toast> <sg-toast variant="error" open duration="0"> Something went wrong. Please try again. </sg-toast> </sg-toast-container> `, }

declarations.name: NotDismissible
declarations.default: { render: (args) => html` <sg-toast variant=${args.variant || 'info'} ?open=${args.open} ?dismissible=${args.dismissible} duration="0" > This notification cannot be dismissed. </sg-toast> `, args: { variant: 'info', open: true, dismissible: false }, }

declarations.description: A glassmorphic toast notification.
declarations.name: SgToast

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the toast is dismissed.

declarations.description:
A glass-styled tooltip that appears on hover/focus.

The tooltip popup is rendered in a portal (`document.body`) so it always
floats above any overflow-clipped parent. When `position="auto"` (default)
it automatically picks the corner with the most available viewport space.
declarations.name: SgTooltip

cssProperties.description: Gap between the trigger and the tooltip.
cssProperties.name: --sg-tooltip-gap

members.name: _resolvedPos
members.description: The actual position resolved after auto-detection.

members.name: _portalEl
members.description: Portal element appended to document.body.

members.name: #detectPosition
members.description: Detect the best corner for the tooltip.

members.name: #showPortal
members.description: Create and show the portal with the tooltip content.

members.name: #clampPortal
members.description: Push the tooltip back on-screen if it overflows the viewport.

members.name: #hidePortal
members.description: Destroy the portal.
